title: rustyline::DefaultEditor::new().unwrap() in chat panics on headless env
description: commands.rs line 136: 'let mut rl = rustyline::DefaultEditor::new().unwrap()' panics if rustyline can't initialize (no terminal, CI environment, stdin redirected). wallet_restore() handles this identically but uses .map_err(|e| anyhow!(...))? instead of .unwrap(). Scenario: 'nie chat' piped into a headless script panics rather than returning a clean error. The panic message provides no actionable information. Fix: change to .map_err()? consistent with wallet_restore.
